title: lithospermum helleri
intro: Lithospermum helleri, also known as Heller's gromwell or rock gromwell, is a flowering plant in the borage family that is native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Lithospermum helleri has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting respiratory function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
